name.description: Wire name of the parameter: the query key or the (case-insensitive) header field name.

location.description: Where the parameter travels: the URL query string or a request header.

required.description: Whether the operation requires the parameter to be present.

repeatable.description: Whether the parameter may appear more than once (e.g. a repeated query filter).

enum.description: Closed set of accepted values when the grammar is a fixed enum; null otherwise.

schemaRef.description: Generated schema name (optionally a `Name#/properties/field` pointer) that types this parameter's value when it is not a simple enum; null otherwise.

description.description: One-line human semantics of the parameter.

ControlOperationParameter.description: A query or header request parameter an operation reads (never the JSON body).
